summary: S2-BIOMES fix VERIFIED. 6/6 checks PASS. All 8 biomes: card intervals match bible s.4.3, arc IDs match s.3.6, arc_cards (3,4,3,5,4,4,3,5) correct, arc_condition types+values correct. New condition types runs_in_biome (landes) + fins_vues (collines) confirmed present. foret_broceliande unchanged. 1 LOW note: cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction='korrigans' may conflict with arc unlock condition (Rep Niamh ≥ 30). Non-blocking.

notes.description: cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction='korrigans' — thematic mismatch. Arc unlock requires Rep Niamh >= 30 and bible PNJ table lists cotes as Niamh territory. Korrigans are traditionally marais/swamp faction. Non-blocking cosmetic inconsistency.

new_bugs_created.description: cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction should be 'niamh' not 'korrigans' — thematic alignment with arc condition + PNJ lore
